case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES VS. INDALECIO N. NUNEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-14-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
